name: viirs_bright_proxy
description: VIIRS night lights bright pixels (median 2022-2024, threshold 50.0 nW/cm²/sr, urban-masked via MODIS LC). Unverified proxy for gas flares / industrial activity outside manual coverage.

properties.notes: Auto-generated bright pixels (NOT urban). Unverified proxy.
